chapter_title.ar: باب ضَمَانِ الْمُضَارَبَةِ وَ مَا لَهُ مِنَ الرِّبْحِ وَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْوَضِيعَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Guarantor of the speculation and what is for him from the profit and what is against him from the loss

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/292)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/292)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) فِي رَجُلٍ لَهُ عَلَى رَجُلٍ مَالٌ فَيَتَقَاضَاهُ وَ لَا يَكُونُ عِنْدَهُ فَيَقُولُ هُوَ عِنْدَكَ مُضَارَبَةً قَالَ لَا يَصْلُحُ حَتَّى يَقْبِضَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said regarding a man who had some wealth for him upon a man, so he demanded it but it did not happen to be with him. So he said, ‘It is with you on a profit-sharing basis’, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not correct until he takes possession of it (then lends it out on such a basis)’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that about the case of a man who owed a certain amount of assets to another man who demanded it but he did not have it, then told him to keep it as capital for Mudarabah (profit sharing), ’Amir al-Mu’minin, has said, ‘It is not valid until he takes possession.’”
